name: eval_narrative_reply_entities
notes: D2 (v0.6.0): extractor input includes the accepted narrator reply. The NPC name and location appear ONLY in the narrative field — the player's words are deliberately vague. Asserts the extractor picks entities out of the narrator's text.
transcript: I step inside and ask the person behind the counter about a room for the night.
narrative: The common room of the Gilded Flagon is thick with pipe smoke. Behind the counter, a stout dwarven woman named Brunhild looks you over and slides a brass key across the wood. "Two silver, ranger. Top of the stairs, second door."
